name: Ant Design
description: Ant Design is a React UI library providing 80+ enterprise-class components for building web applications. Access component documentation, design tokens, theme customization, and migration guides.

skills.name: Component Lookup
skills.description: Look up Ant Design React component documentation, props, default values, and usage examples.

skills.name: Theme Customization
skills.description: Customize Ant Design theme using Design Tokens and ConfigProvider.

skills.name: Version Migration
skills.description: Migrate between Ant Design major versions, especially v4 to v5.
